title: penguins and ect
description: a mod that adds a bunch of cool items a lot of them penguin related and a few qol items.
body:
a mod that adds a bunch of cool items a lot of them penguin related and a few qol items.

-----what this mod adds-----
adds, penguin armor and gear a even more rare upgrade past netherite.
adds the infinity apple is hard to find and you haft to find once to be able to craft and cost multiple hours of you life to craft. 
adds a flight stick which allows survival flight! 
added craft able spanners and findable spawn eggs.
this is all for version 1.0.0
